scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @blog-review/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @blog-review/server" "npm run dev --workspace @blog-review/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @blog-review/shared && npm run build --workspace @blog-review/server && npm run build --workspace @blog-review/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @blog-review/shared && npm run test --workspace @blog-review/server && npm run test --workspace @blog-review/web
